'''N2-3P0''' was a gold and blue [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] who served the [[Friends of Paran]] resistance group on [[Derilyn]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. N2-3PO had a feminine programming and was known to add [[Gamorrese]] curses in her speech.

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']] {{1st}}
